name: pave-soc
description: PAVE/DLVN SOC automation. Bundles SOC skills (daily security reporting, alert triage, user activity tracking, AWS firewall/security-group review, web-app penetration testing, with more to come) backed by OpenSearch, AWS CloudWatch, a Dockerised AWS firewall-review MCP collector, Burp Suite, Claude in Chrome, Atlassian, and Slack.
